name: youtrack-issue
description: Standalone CLI for fetching YouTrack issues by ID

scripts.test: vitest run test/attachments-mode.test.mjs test/cli-config-commands.test.mjs test/cli-help-and-validation.test.mjs test/fields-mode.test.mjs test/projects-mode.test.mjs test/request-timeout.test.mjs
scripts.test:verbose: vitest run test/attachments-mode.test.mjs test/cli-config-commands.test.mjs test/cli-help-and-validation.test.mjs test/fields-mode.test.mjs test/projects-mode.test.mjs test/request-timeout.test.mjs --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:watch: vitest test/attachments-mode.test.mjs test/cli-config-commands.test.mjs test/cli-help-and-validation.test.mjs test/fields-mode.test.mjs test/projects-mode.test.mjs test/request-timeout.test.mjs
